import pytest
import math
from source import sqrt

@pytest.mark.timeout(1)
def test_sqrt_accuracy():
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    expected = math.sqrt(2)
    assert abs(result - expected) <= 0.01, f"sqrt(2, 0.01) returned {result}, which is not within 0.01 of expected {expected}"
